message:
Add 10,000+ lines of no-mock integration tests across 12 crates and update connector test suites

New no-mock integration test suites (8 new files, ~10k lines total):

fcp-bootstrap (745 lines): Real bootstrap pipelines spanning recovery
phrase → keypair → genesis, ceremony lifecycle with phase state machine
transitions, cold recovery workflows, and configuration validation.

fcp-crypto (777 lines): Cross-module crypto pipelines: AEAD+HKDF
round-trips, Ed25519+COSE token sign/verify, X25519+HPKE key exchange,
Shamir secret sharing+HPKE reconstruction, and canonicalization+signing.

fcp-mesh (2740 lines): Full mesh subsystem testing: admission control,
device registration, gossip protocol message handling, transport layer
session management, symbol request/response cycles, planner resource
allocation, and degraded-mode fallback paths.

fcp-oauth (852 lines): OAuth1 signature generation and verification,
OAuth2 authorization code flow with PKCE, client credentials flow,
token refresh and revocation, and error mapping for HTTP failures.

fcp-raptorq (1211 lines): RaptorQ fountain code encode/decode
round-trips across various block sizes, symbol loss patterns,
systematic vs repair symbol handling, and decoder convergence.

fcp-sandbox (1014 lines): EgressGuard policy evaluation with host/port/
IP constraints, hostname canonicalization (IDNA, SSRF prevention),
IPv4-mapped IPv6 bypass detection, CIDR deny list enforcement, and
wildcard hostname matching edge cases.

fcp-streaming (1337 lines): WebSocket connect/disconnect lifecycle,
message send/receive with binary and text frames, reconnection with
backoff, SSE event parsing with retry fields, and ping/pong keepalive.

fcp-telemetry (1477 lines): Trace context propagation, span lifecycle,
metric recording, context nesting/scoping, correlation ID threading,
and W3C traceparent/tracestate round-trips.

Expanded existing test suites (4 files):

fcp-host: +732 lines — connector discovery, health check aggregation,
doctor diagnostic output, and multi-connector lifecycle management.

fcp-registry: +568 lines — connector registration, version negotiation,
capability querying, and concurrent registry access.

fcp-webhook: +1071 lines — webhook delivery, retry with backoff,
signature verification, payload validation, and dead letter handling.

fcp-store: +18 lines — ObjectSymbolMeta API alignment.

Refactored: fcp-testkit differential_regression.rs consolidated and
simplified (-573/+326 net).

Connector test suites: All 9 connector integration test files updated
for the asupersync HTTP migration — mock server setup, response
assertions, and error handling now use the new HttpClient types.
Telegram tests expanded with +408/-280 lines of additional coverage.
GitLab tests expanded with +320/-195. GraphQL client tests expanded
with +975 lines covering dedup, caching, retry, and schema validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
